metadata.description: Eight lenses for great design — an auto-invoked decision-and-critique framework for Claude Code.

plugins.name: design-lens
plugins.displayName: design-lens — Eight Lenses for Great Design
plugins.description: A complete framework for making and judging great design. Eight lenses — Purpose, Agency, Responsibility, Familiarity, Flexibility, Simplicity, Craft, Delight — encoded as working questions, usage modes (build / review / single-decision), and a self-audit checklist. Auto-invokes whenever design quality matters, on any platform.
